issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing files or unsupported formats.
The documentation contains verbose comments and explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment and does not provide guidance for other platforms.

scenarios.name: responsive-variants-webp-and-avif
scenarios.rationale: Treatment iterates a [320,640,960,1280,1920] breakpoint array, reads metadata().width to skip upscaling, emits webp({quality:80}) primary plus progressive jpeg fallback, and adds avif({quality:50}) noting the differing quality scale; baseline writes one-off resize/webp calls without the upscale guard or quality-scale awareness.

scenarios.name: avatar-upload-pipeline-with-exif-strip
scenarios.rationale: Treatment chains .rotate() first to apply EXIF orientation, uses resize(200,200,{fit:'cover',position:'centre'}) for the square avatar, generates the 800w display and 40x40 thumb, and strips metadata via withMetadata({orientation: undefined}); baseline commonly forgets the rotate() step and EXIF strip for user uploads.
